name: Dark Web Monitoring
description: Monitors dark web sources for mentions of the organization, its domains, credentials, or brand assets. When a dark web mention alert is received, the playbook parses the mention context, uses AI to assess exposure severity and potential impact, and routes based on risk level. High-risk exposures (credential dumps, data leaks) trigger immediate credential resets, executive notification, and incident ticket creation. Low-risk mentions are documented and placed in monitoring status.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Recorded Future
required_integrations.reason: Retrieve dark web mention details, context, and threat actor attribution

required_integrations.name: Active Directory
required_integrations.reason: Force credential resets for compromised accounts identified in dark web leaks

config.description: Triggers when a dark web monitoring service detects a mention of organizational assets, credentials, or brand

config.code:
alert = inputs.get('alert', {})

mention_type = alert.get('mention_type', 'unknown')
source_forum = alert.get('source', 'unknown')
raw_content = alert.get('content', '')
affected_emails = alert.get('affected_emails', [])
affected_domains = alert.get('affected_domains', [])
data_types = alert.get('data_types_exposed', [])

is_credential_leak = mention_type in ['credential_dump', 'credential_leak'] or 'password' in str(data_types).lower()
is_data_leak = mention_type in ['data_leak', 'database_dump'] or len(data_types) > 2

result = {
    'mention_type': mention_type,
    'source_forum': source_forum,
    'affected_emails': affected_emails,
    'affected_email_count': len(affected_emails),
    'affected_domains': affected_domains,
    'data_types_exposed': data_types,
    'is_credential_leak': is_credential_leak,
    'is_data_leak': is_data_leak,
    'content_preview': raw_content[:500]
}
config.description: Parses the dark web mention alert to extract affected emails, domains, data types exposed, and categorizes the mention type

config.additional_instructions: Assess the dark web mention for organizational exposure severity. Determine the type of data exposed, potential impact on operations, likelihood of exploitation, and recommended immediate actions. Classify risk as low, medium, high, or critical.
config.description: AI-powered assessment of the dark web mention to determine exposure severity, potential impact, and recommended response actions
Routes based on whether the dark web mention constitutes a high-risk exposure requiring immediate response
Forces immediate password reset and MFA re-registration for all accounts identified in the dark web credential leak

notify.subject: DARK WEB ALERT: {{code_1.outputs.result.mention_type}} — Organizational Data Exposed

config.description: Sends high-priority notification to CISO and security team with exposure details and response actions taken

create_ticket.title: Dark Web Exposure: {{code_1.outputs.result.mention_type}} — {{code_1.outputs.result.affected_email_count}} Accounts

config.description: Creates an incident ticket for SOC Tier 2 to track the dark web exposure response and remediation
Documents the low-risk dark web mention with context for future reference
Places the low-risk dark web mention in monitoring status for continued observation
